raw_messages.content:
# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.

Hi, I need some assistance with a flight change. I have a trip to Texas today, and I need to change my return flight from 3 PM to a later one that day, or the earliest one the next day if that's not possible. Can you help me with that?

Sure, I can help with that. Could you please provide me with your user ID, the origin and destination airports for your trip, and the details of your current reservation, including the flight numbers and dates? This will help me find the best options for you. If you don't have the user ID, you can provide any other identifying information you might have, such as the reservation ID or the passenger names.

My user ID is olivia_gonzalez_2305, and I'm traveling from Newark (EWR) to Texas. I don't remember the reservation ID, but my current return flight is from Texas to Newark (EWR) at 3 PM today. Could you check my options for a later flight today or the earliest one tomorrow?

Could you please provide me with the exact date and time of your outbound flight from Newark to Texas? This will help me locate the correct return flight for you.
Sure, my outbound flight from Newark (EWR) to Texas was at 7 AM today. Can you check for available return flights from Texas to Newark (EWR) for later today or the earliest one tomorrow?

Great, I will search for available return flights from Texas to Newark (EWR) for later today or the earliest one tomorrow. Could you please provide me with the destination airport in three-letter IATA code (e.g., IAH for Houston) so I can perform the search accurately?

Also, do you have any preferences regarding the time or the airline?
The destination airport in Texas is DFW. I prefer to stay with the same airline if possible, but I'm open to other options if it helps me get a later flight today or an early one tomorrow.
It seems there are no direct flights available from DFW (Dallas/Fort Worth) to EWR (Newark) later today. Let's check for the earliest available flight tomorrow.
